title: Milestone
description:
A milestone, tracking a named feature delivery across one or more gate spec chunks.

Persisted to `.assay/milestones/<slug>.toml`. The `slug` field in the file
must match the filename (e.g. `my-feature.toml` → `slug = "my-feature"`).

chunks.description: Ordered list of chunk references included in this milestone.

completed_chunks.description:
Slugs of chunks that have been verified and advanced past in the development cycle.

This is the central state for the cycle state machine: the "active chunk" is
derived at runtime as the lowest-`order` `ChunkRef` whose slug is not in this list.

created_at.description: When this milestone record was first created.

depends_on.description: Milestone slugs that must be `Complete` before this one can start.

description.description: Optional longer description of the milestone.

pr_base.description: Target base branch for the pull request (e.g. `"main"`).

pr_body_template.description:
Template for the PR body with placeholder substitution.

Supported placeholders: `{milestone_name}`, `{milestone_slug}`,
`{chunk_list}` (bulleted chunk names), `{gate_summary}` (pass/fail per chunk).

pr_branch.description: Feature branch name for this milestone's pull request (e.g. `"feat/my-feature"`).

pr_labels.description: Labels to apply to the GitHub pull request (e.g. `["ready-for-review", "feature"]`).

pr_number.description: GitHub pull request number, set after successful PR creation.

pr_reviewers.description: GitHub usernames to request as reviewers on the pull request.

pr_url.description: GitHub pull request URL, set after successful PR creation.

slug.description: Unique identifier for this milestone; must match the TOML filename without extension.

updated_at.description: When this milestone record was last updated.

ChunkRef.description:
A reference to a `GatesSpec` chunk within a milestone, identified by slug and scheduling constraints.

Each `ChunkRef` corresponds to a directory-based spec (a "chunk") that
contributes to the parent milestone. The `order` field is cosmetic display ordering only;
use `depends_on` to declare scheduling constraints between chunks.

depends_on.description:
Dependencies: slugs of other chunks **within the same milestone** that must complete before this one.
Values must match `ChunkRef.slug` values in the parent `Milestone.chunks` list.
Cross-milestone dependencies are not supported.

Used during manifest generation to emit scheduling constraints in the output TOML.
Slug references are not validated at this layer — validation of dangling refs and cycles
is the responsibility of `manifest_gen::generate_manifest`.
Empty by default — chunks without explicit deps execute in parallel.

order.description: Cosmetic display order only. Use `depends_on` to declare scheduling constraints.

slug.description: Slug of the referenced `GatesSpec` (matches the spec directory/file name).

MilestoneStatus.description:
Lifecycle status of a milestone.

Transitions follow the canonical path:
`Draft` → `InProgress` → `Verify` → `Complete`

oneOf.description: Milestone is being defined but not yet in active development.
All chunks pass gates; awaiting human or automated verification.
Milestone is fully complete and merged.
